packageRules.description: Group all non-major npm/pnpm updates — specific rules below override for version-matched sets
Group all non-major Python package updates (pep621/pyproject.toml)
Group all non-major Cargo crate updates
Group vitest and all @vitest/* packages — must stay version-matched to avoid runtime warnings
Group react and react-dom — must stay version-matched
Group @types/react and @types/react-dom — should track react versions
Group tailwindcss and @tailwindcss/vite — plugin must stay compatible with tailwind core
Group vite and @vitejs/plugin-react — plugin must stay compatible with vite
Group @testing-library packages — jest-dom and react should track together
